title: WW3: Endgame
excerpt: Directed by The Military-Industrial Complex. Executive Produced by Legacy Media. Runtime: 4–8 years.

title: Not Validation
excerpt: Maybe it was never about validation. Maybe it was just fear of death, trying to disguise itself as the need to be seen.

title: The Quiet Contract
excerpt: To begin in not knowing, to end in not knowing, and to think in between as if it might still matter.

title: How to Stay With It
excerpt: Understanding does not make the world simpler. If anything, it makes it heavier. And yet, something else grows there.

title: We Lost the Manuals
excerpt: Confusion isn't the glitch. It's the shield.
